task: Find the weight of baggage allowance for economy class on Qatar Airways.
final_result_response:
I now have all the information needed. Let me present a comprehensive answer.

Here is the **Economy Class Baggage Allowance** on Qatar Airways (from their official baggage allowance page):

---

### 🧳 Economy Class — Baggage Allowance

#### ✈️ Carry-On Baggage (All Economy Fares)
- **1 piece** up to **7 kg (15 lb)**
- *(Exception: For flights to/from Brazil, Economy class passengers may carry **1 piece up to 10 kg / 22 lb**.)*

---

#### 🧾 Checked Baggage — By Fare Type:

| Fare Type | Flights to/from Africa or the Americas | All Other Destinations |
|---|---|---|
| **Economy Classic** | 1 piece up to **23 kg (50 lb)** | **20 kg (44 lb)** |
| **Economy Convenience** | 2 pieces up to **23 kg (50 lb)** each | **25 kg (55 lb)** |
| **Economy Comfort** | 2 pieces up to **23 kg (50 lb)** each | **30 kg (66 lb)** |
| *(Higher tier)* | 2 pieces up to **23 kg (50 lb)** each | **35 kg (77 lb)** |

---

**Summary:** Economy class passengers on Qatar Airways get **1 carry-on bag up to 7 kg**, and **checked baggage ranging from 20 kg to 35 kg** depending on the fare type (Classic, Convenience, or Comfort) and destination. Flights to/from Africa or the Americas use a **piece concept** (up to 23 kg per piece), while other routes use a **weight concept**.

Source: [Qatar Airways Baggage Allowance Page](https://www.qatarairways.com/en-us/baggage/allowance.html)

judge.reasoning:

**Output Assessment:** The agent navigated to Qatar Airways' official baggage allowance page (https://www.qatarairways.com/en-us/baggage/allowance.html) and extracted comprehensive economy class baggage data. The final response includes: carry-on (1 piece up to 7 kg / 15 lb), and checked baggage by fare type (Economy Classic: 20 kg; Economy Convenience: 25 kg; Economy Comfort: 30 kg; and a higher tier at 35 kg), plus piece-concept allowances (23 kg per piece) for Africa/Americas routes. A special Brazil exception (10 kg carry-on) was also noted.

**Evidence:** Step 5 shows direct extraction from the Qatar Airways HTML: "Economy Classic Economy Convenience Economy Comfort Carry-on baggage 1 piece up to 7kg (15lb)^ Checked baggage..." with specific weights across fare types and destinations. The step files confirm the data was read from the actual page DOM. Execution integrity status is "healthy" with no errors.

**Summary:** The agent successfully navigated to Qatar Airways' official baggage allowance page and extracted accurate, detailed weight information for economy class baggage across fare types and destinations. The step files confirm the data was directly extracted from the page HTML.
